Frequently Asked Questions

Acetabular cup shell component for hip replacement surgery

This product is manufactured by Not specified and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Latitud Acetabular Cup System - Shell Size 48mm, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Latitud Acetabular Cup System - Shell Size 48mm is constructed using Titanium Alloy (Ti-6Al-7Nb), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
